title: opera-browser-cli: AXI-compliant browser CLI
author: Opera Software
content_summary: Opera Software's AXI-compliant CLI for browser automation, wrapping opera-devtools-mcp. First major corporate vendor implementation of Kun Chen's AXI framework. 40+ commands; emphasis on TOON output, combined navigate+snapshot operations, contextual hints, and AI-native features via Opera Neon.
key_points: MIT licensed, authored by operasoftware (Opera ASA)
Wraps opera-devtools-mcp behind a CLI — same pattern as chrome-devtools-axi
40+ commands spanning interaction, emulation, DevTools, AI features
Validates AXI as a cross-organizational design standard
